message:
feat(core,parser,layout,render-svg): implement pie chart SVG rendering and linkStyle default support

Pie chart rendering:
- Add render_pie_svg() (~110 lines) computing slice geometry, arc paths,
  labels with percentage text, and dynamic text anchoring
- Refactor LayoutNodeBox to carry node_id and span alongside node_index
  for proper pie node metadata propagation
- Use split_once for cleaner pie value parsing in mermaid_parser

Layout constraints:
- Apply IR constraints (SameRank, MinLength) during rank assignment via
  new apply_ir_constraints() call after initial ranking

linkStyle default:
- Add LinkDefault variant to IrStyleTarget enum in fm-core
- Parse "linkStyle default" directives alongside numeric index-based
  linkStyle in mermaid_parser

Test updates:
- Update pie_basic.svg golden file with new rendering output
- Update layout_checksums.json for new pie dimensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
